app.title: Ogulniega Manager
app.subtitle: Select a platform to download mods or manage local files.

alternativeDownload.title: Alternative mod download
alternativeDownload.description: Downloads mods from this repository (versions/ folder) and GitHub Releases, saving them to your local preinstalled folders.
alternativeDownload.selectVersion: Select a version to download mods for:
alternativeDownload.loadError: Could not load versions from the repository.
alternativeDownload.noVersionsInRepo: The repository has no versions/ folder yet.
alternativeDownload.noModsFound: No matching mods were found for the selected version.
alternativeDownload.allFailed: Download failed. No mods were installed.

reinstallMods.title: Reinstall Mods
reinstallMods.chooseSource: Choose where to download mods from:
reinstallMods.loadError: Could not load versions from the source.
reinstallMods.noVersions: No versions are available for this source.
reinstallMods.selectVersion: Select a version to install mods for:
reinstallMods.allFailed: Download failed. No mods were installed.

disable.title: Disable Mods
disable.noMods: No mods found in this version.
disable.clickHint: Click an active mod to act: preinstalled/ mods are disabled, others are deleted. Click a disabled mod to remove it.
disable.confirmRemove: Remove {filename}? The file will be deleted permanently.

duplicates.title: Check Duplicates
duplicates.searchPlaceholder: Search by mod id or filename...
duplicates.hint: These mods appear more than once (same fabric.mod.json id). Click any copy to remove it. The remaining file will keep working.
duplicates.confirmRemove: Remove {filename}? The file will be deleted permanently.

java.title: Java Distributions
java.installNewHint: Java versions for your launcher. Pick a distro, install — folder name matches what the launcher expects.
java.launcherEmpty: No java_name profiles were found in launcher.json — the launcher may be temporarily unavailable.
